title: Aephera's Survival
description: Realistic Overhaul of the Early to Mid game
body:
Aephera's Survival is a Survival Overhaul of the Early to Mid game of Minecraft. It includes many more 'realistic' features such as:
- Removal of Wooden Tools
- Stone axe used as the main stone tools
- Copper and Iron Tool Smithing
- Diamond Bladed tools, rather than diamond tools
- Reworked early game preventing tree punching, instead having the player collect stones and knap them
